items.name: All-You-Can-Eat Korean BBQ
items.description:
Savor endless flavor with our All-You-Can-Eat Korean BBQ! Enjoy unlimited premium meats, fresh side dishes, and the authentic taste of Korea — all grilled to perfection right at your table.
(Note: This is a buffet-style offering with unlimited access to various dishes.)
items.simplified_description: Unlimited Korean BBQ with various meats and side dishes grilled at your table.
items.other_info: LIMITED TIME FOR 2 HOURS; LEFT-OVER FOOD WILL BE CHARGED $5 PER PLATE; LEFT-OVER CAN NOT BE TAKEN TO GO; EVERYONE AT THE TABLE MUST PARTICIPATE IN THE BUFFET; 15% OF THE GRATUITY WILL BE ADDED TO GROUPS OF 6 OR MORE
